query:
-- Dan Day: SA/QLD/VIC/NSW/TAS, pump-only — exclude bess/pal/portable_air
SELECT 'DanDay' AS rep, p.id, p.name, COALESCE(p.productLane,'null') AS productLane, p.projectState,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS send_ready_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.actionTier = 'tier1_actionable'
  AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
  AND (p.projectState IN ('SA','QLD','VIC','NSW','TAS') OR p.location LIKE '%south australia%' OR p.location LIKE '% SA%' OR p.location LIKE '%queensland%' OR p.location LIKE '% QLD%' OR p.location LIKE '%victoria%' OR p.location LIKE '% VIC%' OR p.location LIKE '%new south wales%' OR p.location LIKE '% NSW%' OR p.location LIKE '%tasmania%')
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess','pal','portable_air'))
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY send_ready_count DESC LIMIT 6;

-- Dan Day: SA/QLD/VIC/NSW/TAS, pump-only — exclude bess/pal/portable_air
SELECT 'DanDay' AS rep, p.id, p.name, COALESCE(p.productLane,'null') AS productLane, p.projectState,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS send_ready_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.actionTier = 'tier1_actionable'
  AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
  AND (p.projectState IN ('SA','QLD','VIC','NSW','TAS') OR p.location LIKE '%south australia%' OR p.location LIKE '% SA%' OR p.location LIKE '%queensland%' OR p.location LIKE '% QLD%' OR p.location LIKE '%victoria%' OR p.location LIKE '% VIC%' OR p.location LIKE '%new south wales%' OR p.location LIKE '% NSW%' OR p.location LIKE '%tasmania%')
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess','pal','portable_air'))
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY send_ready_count DESC LIMIT 6;
